name: The Agency Framework
description: For marketing, design, and creative agencies

bookingTypes.name: Strategy Call
bookingTypes.description: A focused conversation to audit your current setup, identify gaps, and map out a plan.

bookingTypes.name: Client Check-In
bookingTypes.description: Your regular touchpoint to review progress, align on priorities, and keep things moving.

emailTemplates.name: Lead Acknowledgment
emailTemplates.subject: Got your message — here's what happens next

emailTemplates.name: Pre-Call Brief
emailTemplates.subject: Quick prep for our strategy call
emailTemplates.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Looking forward to our call. To make it productive, could you share:

1. Your current website URL
2. Your biggest marketing challenge right now
3. Your monthly budget range
4. Your ideal timeline

Just reply to this email.

{{ownerName}}

emailTemplates.name: Proposal Follow-Up
emailTemplates.subject: Your proposal from {{businessName}}
emailTemplates.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Following up on the proposal we discussed. Here's the scope and next steps.

If you're ready to move forward, the next step is signing the agreement. If you have questions, let's jump on a quick call.

{{ownerName}}

emailTemplates.name: Onboarding Welcome
emailTemplates.subject: Welcome to {{businessName}} — let's get started

emailTemplates.name: Monthly Report
emailTemplates.subject: Your {{month}} report is ready

emailTemplates.name: Feedback Request
emailTemplates.subject: How are we doing? 2-minute check
emailTemplates.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We want to make sure we're delivering the results you expect. Could you take 2 minutes to answer:

1. On a scale of 1-10, how satisfied are you?
2. What's one thing we could do better?

Your feedback shapes how we work.

{{ownerName}}

emailTemplates.name: Exit Survey
emailTemplates.subject: Thanks for working with us, {{firstName}}
emailTemplates.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Thank you for trusting {{businessName}} with your business. We'd appreciate your honest feedback:

1. What went well?
2. What could we improve?
3. Would you refer us to others?

Wishing you continued success.

{{ownerName}}

landingPage.headline: Your growth shouldn't depend on guesswork.
landingPage.subhead: {{businessName}} builds the strategy, systems, and creative that turn attention into revenue.

automationSuggestions.name: Send acknowledgment when a new lead comes in
Send prep brief when strategy call is booked
Follow up if prospect goes quiet for 5+ days
Send onboarding pack when deal is won
Ask for feedback after project handoff
Send exit survey when client churns
Send SMS confirmation for booked calls
automationSuggestions.message: Your call with {{businessName}} is confirmed for {{bookingDate}} at {{bookingTime}}.
